statement.en: Learning to adapt : neurophysiological insights into split-belt treadmill walking following a stroke
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a provisional research thesis (embargo status) with neurophysiological and motor learning content. The work addresses adaptation mechanisms post-stroke using split-belt treadmill methodology—empirically grounded but not yet peer-validated or published. Classification as FLOWING reflects its pre-dissemination, evolving status.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 脳は左右の不均衡を感じ取り、時間とともに自らを再調整する神秘的な力を持つ。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 左右の足が最初は異なるリズムで踊るが、脳という見えぬ架橋によって次第に同期していく。
